tasks.label: backend: dev server
args: source .venv/bin/activate && export LMSTUDIO_TIMEOUT=360 && export CV_TMP_DIR="${TMPDIR}job-agent-${UID}" && export CV_PROFILE_STORE="${CV_TMP_DIR}/profiles/cv_profiles.json" && export CV_PROFILE_IMAGE_DIR="${CV_TMP_DIR}/profiles/images" && export CV_DEBUG_TEX=1 && export CV_DEBUG_TEX_DIR="${CV_TMP_DIR}/debug" && mkdir -p "${CV_TMP_DIR}" "${CV_DEBUG_TEX_DIR}" "$(dirname "${CV_PROFILE_STORE}")" "${CV_PROFILE_IMAGE_DIR}" && cd backend && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
